title: doliocarpus dentatus subsp. rufescens
intro: Doliocarpus dentatus subsp. rufescens, also known as the Red-tinged Doliocarpus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Doliocarpaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Doliocarpus dentatus subsp. rufescens include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies for various health conditions.
